LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS-COMPLAINANTS THE MILLS BUILDING AND THE SWIG COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. THE MOTION DOES NOT COMPLETELY DISPOSE OF THE BREACH OF CONTRACT CLAIM BECAUSE THE ISSUE OF DAMAGES HAS NOT BEEN ESTABLISHED AS REFLECTED IN FACT 12. THERE ALSO IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT AS TO WHETHER SENTINEL NEGLIGENTLY PERFORMED OR FAILED TO PERFORM ITS OBLIGATIONS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
